issues.detail: The skill does not fully handle API error scenarios or edge cases such as missing tokens or malformed responses.
The documentation contains verbose explanatory comments that could be trimmed for brevity.

scenarios.name: Sync GitHub issues into Notion database
scenarios.rationale: Baseline calls Notion endpoints but typically mis-shapes property values (plain strings instead of nested title/rich_text arrays) and forgets the Notion-Version header; treatment queries /v1/databases/{id}/query for existing pages, then create/update with correct title, number, select, multi_select, and url property shapes plus Bearer token and Notion-Version: 2022-06-28.

scenarios.name: Paginated query of in-progress pages
scenarios.rationale: Baseline hits the endpoint once and misses the has_more/next_cursor loop and the version header; treatment posts a filter to /v1/databases/{id}/query, iterates with start_cursor while has_more is true, and includes Notion-Version: 2022-06-28.
